title: Space-Gear
body:
## Have you always wanted to explore space horizons? Or did you want to combine magic and mechanisms? The **_Space-Gear_** modpack has it all!

Space-Gear is designed to explore mods such as: Ad astra, Botania, Create and its add-ons, and many other mods. The modpack is designed for both single player and playing with friends, or even to create your own server with this modpack. 

If there was a problem during the game, do not hesitate to contact our [Discord server](https://discord.com/invite/CKTJQyd7Mk) for support, and we will solve this problem! Also join us if you have any ideas and feedback that you want to share - everyone is welcome.

This also means that it can be updated to new versions of Minecraft if there are mods that work on this version. In addition, we receive updates of modifications quickly. So the modpack will always be relevant.
